security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Audits a Windows endpoint against a CIS Benchmark you provide.
bundle.longDescription: Parses CIS Microsoft Benchmark PDFs you provide — covering Windows 10 and 11 across the Intune, Enterprise, and Stand-alone profiles — and evaluates the local endpoint against them. Everything runs on the device being audited; no data leaves it.
